title: Support device
abstract: A support device is described that comprises a substrate support member (14), the substrate support member (14) being provided with or defining an opening or recess (24) through which a truss support member (26) extends, the truss support member (26) including a screw threaded section with which a pair of threaded adjustment members (28) cooperate, at least part of the substrate support member (14) being located between the threaded adjustment members (28), the truss support member (26) further defining a support tape engagement region (30) with which a truss support tape (32) cooperates, in use.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A support device comprising a substrate support member, the substrate support member being provided with or defining an opening or recess through which a truss support member extends, the truss support member including a screw threaded section with which a pair of threaded adjustment members cooperate, at least part of the substrate support member being located between the threaded adjustment members, the truss support member further defining a support tape engagement region with which a truss support tape cooperates, in use. 2. A device according to Claim 1, wherein the substrate support member is mounted to a support leg whereby the substrate support member is supported at a desired height above the ground. 3. A device according to Claim 2, wherein the leg is of adjustable length. 4. A device according to Claim 1, wherein the substrate support member takes the form of an intermediate support member that is carried by a trough-like section member. 5. A device according to Claim 4, wherein the substrate support member serves to support the trough-like section member so as to maintain it in a desired cross-sectional shape. 6. A device according to Claim 4 or Claim 5, wherein the substrate support member is an interference fit with the trough-like section member. 7. A device according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the substrate support member is arranged to carry a single row of substrate material. 8. A device according to Claim 7, wherein the substrate support member carries a pair of truss support members located to both sides of the substrate to support truss stems and crop trusses to both sides of the substrate. 9. A device according to any of Claims 1 to 6, wherein the substrate support member is arranged to carry two or more rows of substrate material. 10. A device according to Claim 9, wherein the substrate support member serves to support a net or the like to provide support to intermediate located truss stems and crop trusses, truss support members being provided to provide support for externally located truss stems and crop trusses. 11. A crop support system comprising a series of substrate support members supporting therebetween a trough-like section member, each substrate support member being provided with or defining an opening or recess through which a truss support member extends, the truss support member including a screw threaded section with which a pair of threaded adjustment members cooperate, at least part of the substrate support member being located between the threaded adjustment members, the truss support member further defining a support tape engagement region with which a truss support tape cooperates, in use. 12. A system according to Claim 11, wherein a first group of the substrate support members are mounted upon legs, and a second group of substrate support members are located intermediate the first group, the second group of substrate support members being carried by the trough-like section member.
